name: can-claude-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace by wangcansunking — project planning, agent teams, and developer tools

plugins.name: plan-harness
plugins.description: Structured project planning with agent teams — unified /plan-gen dispatcher for every doc type, cascade sync, interactive test-report fix-loop with live Playwright MCP execution, /asset route + server-injected lightbox for evidence screenshots. Built-in comment UI with W3C-style anchors, @-mention queue for agent personas, and resolved-thread sidebar toggle. 10 skills, 12 MCP tools, 6 agent roles.

plugins.name: claude-config-manager
plugins.description: Dashboard + CLI for managing Claude Code configurations — profiles, export/import, MCP store, plugin marketplace, sessions, metrics. CLI-first operations (`claude-config`) with 5 slash commands (`/ccm`, `/ccm-dashboard`, `/ccm-profile`, `/ccm-export`, `/ccm-import`) and an intentionally minimal 2-tool MCP surface (dashboard status + open).
